targets.rawSql:
WITH last_per_employee AS (
  SELECT mitarbeiter, MAX(datum::date) AS last_date
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
    AND datum::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
    AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
  GROUP BY mitarbeiter
),
last_row AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (w.mitarbeiter)
    w.mitarbeiter,
    w.datum::date AS datum,
    w.ma_kat
  FROM xl_projecttimes w
  JOIN last_per_employee l
    ON w.mitarbeiter = l.mitarbeiter
   AND w.datum::date = l.last_date
  WHERE ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR w.bereich_neu IN (${service:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR w.task_new IN (${activity:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR w.mitarbeiter IN (${employee:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR w.ma_kat IN (${ma_kat:sqlstring}))
  ORDER BY w.mitarbeiter, w.datum DESC
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(ma_kat, '') AS "MA-Kat",
  mitarbeiter AS "Employee",
  TO_CHAR(datum, 'DD.MM.YYYY') AS "last transaction",
  (CURRENT_DATE - datum)::integer AS "OffDays",
  ROUND(((CURRENT_DATE - datum)::numeric / 30.0), 2) AS "OffMonth"
FROM last_row
ORDER BY "MA-Kat", "OffDays" DESC

list.label: Bereich
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
